name: Unusual Parent for a Process
notes: This rule triggers when an unusual parent is found for a process.
db_fields_used: MD5 Hash, Process Name, Parent Process Name, Process Path
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create
when any of Process Name (custom) are contained in any of (Shared) ProcesstoParentProcessPathRefMapKeys - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
when the event matches REFERENCEMAPSETCONTAINS('ProcessMaptoProcessParentPath', LOWER("Process Name"), LOWER("Parent Process Path")) AQL filter query

when any of MD5 Hash (custom), Process Name (custom), Parent Process Name (custom), Process Path (custom) are contained in any of (Shared) Unusual parent MD5 - AlphaNumeric, (Shared) P.Name - AlphaNumeric, (Shared) PP.name - AlphaNumeric, (Shared) P.path - AlphaNumeric
TD_list: APPLY Unusual Parent for a Process on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create
AND when any of Process Name (custom) are contained in any of (Shared) ProcesstoParentProcessPathRefMapKeys - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
AND NOT when the event matches REFERENCEMAPSETCONTAINS('ProcessMaptoProcessParentPath', LOWER("Process Name"), LOWER("Parent Process Path")) AQL filter query

AND NOT when any of MD5 Hash (custom), Process Name (custom), Parent Process Name (custom), Process Path (custom) are contained in any of (Shared) Unusual parent MD5 - AlphaNumeric, (Shared) P.Name - AlphaNumeric, (Shared) PP.name - AlphaNumeric, (Shared) P.path - AlphaNumeric
RED_list: Event name: Detected Abnormal Parent for a Process
Event description: Detects if a process will be launched from an unusual parent
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
